{"text":"Perfect! I've created a comprehensive AI-powered IELTS preparation platform with a clean, modern design featuring soft blue-to-purple gradients, rounded cards, and a motivating user experience. The platform includes:

**Landing Page** - A premium SaaS-style page with hero section, problem-solution framework, feature highlights, student testimonials, and pricing tiers.

**Dashboard** - Clean interface showing overall band score with breakdown, progress trends, quick start buttons for each practice type, AI-detected weak areas, and daily goal tracking with streak counter.

**Writing Practice** - Split-screen layout with question prompt and timer on the left, distraction-free editor on the right, and comprehensive AI feedback showing band scores for all four criteria (Task Response, Coherence, Vocabulary, Grammar) with specific corrections and suggestions.

**Speaking Practice** - Voice recording interface with large circular record button, AI analysis showing fluency meter, pronunciation heatmap, filler word detection, grammar corrections, and sample answer comparisons.

**Listening Practice** - Audio player with questions panel, detailed mistake breakdown identifying spelling errors, distractor traps, and number mistakes, plus replay functionality for difficult segments.

**Analytics Page** - Comprehensive data visualization with line charts for band score progress, bar charts for practice volume, radar charts for skills breakdown, and detailed metrics for each skill type.

The design follows the Duolingo + Notion + Grammarly aesthetic with generous whitespace, icon-based navigation, progress-driven elements, and motivating microcopy throughout. All pages are fully responsive with mobile-friendly layouts.","textMode":"visible_message"}
